calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Heart Magazines' Motion for Assignment Order is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Andrew Cheng, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hearst Magazines, a division of Hearst Communications, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Jewelry by Rosalina, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 4, 2009. Amended default was entered on June 10, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hearst Magazines, a division of Hearst Communications, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Jewelry by Rosalina, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,511.78.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Treble Damanges in accordance with Civil Code Section 1719 - $1,500.00.
Costs - $420.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,431.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Continued To Aug-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
